attributes.action: Revision for the weekend/online learning payback
attributes.additional_details:
Either provide us more time or haaving the opportunity to finish the academic year without payback. 
For the Universities or classes providers to give us accurate alternatives.
attributes.background: We are many students in such a difficult situation right now as the payback information, course changing and the law where our courses were not eligible from the begining was given to us too late. We are nearly finishing the academic year. Please review and re-consider the decision.

rejection.details:
We already have a petition on this subject which was opened before recent Government announcements which suggest that students affected have been given a reprieve.

You may wish to sign this petition anyway:
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762730
